text: For purposes of this chapter, “agency” includes the Regents of the University of California.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 7. Arrest Quotas [41600 - 41603]
##### § 41601.5

For purposes of this chapter, “agency” includes the Regents of the University of California.

*(Added by Stats. 2002, Ch. 105, Sec. 2. Effective January 1, 2003.)*

subsections.text: For purposes of this chapter, “agency” includes the Regents of the University of California.

history.raw: (Added by Stats. 2002, Ch. 105, Sec. 2. Effective January 1, 2003.)
